data.content: Shipment review approved. Verified: (1) merge commit 71d3849e on main with feature commits b091f5ac, 8550f31d; (2) settings-pools-section.tsx reverted from grid to flex layout with fixed widths w-[140px]/sm:w-[220px]; (3) AgentDisplayLabel gains layout prop (default 'inline', 'stacked' only used in pool row) — 7 other consumers unaffected; (4) tests updated to assert flex layout and stacked pills; (5) lint clean (0 errors), typecheck clean, 2355 tests pass, build succeeds. All acceptance criteria met.
